Faq.heading: Commonly asked questions.
Faq.subheading: Everything you need to know about working with Aura.

item0.question: Do you only work with enterprise companies?
item0.answer: While our infrastructure is built for enterprise scale, we frequently partner with well-funded startups and mid-market companies that require robust, high-performance systems from day one to support rapid scaling.

item1.question: What is your typical project timeline?
item1.answer: Project timelines vary based on complexity, but most initial MVPs or phase-one deliverables are complete within 2 to 3 months. Enterprise migrations or core system rewrites generally span 6 to 12 months with continuous agile delivery.

item2.question: How do you handle security and compliance?
item2.answer: Security is baked into our CI/CD pipelines. We adhere strictly to SOC 2, HIPAA, or ISO 27001 compliance standards depending on your industry. All code undergoes automated vulnerability scanning and manual peer review.

item3.question: Will we own the intellectual property (IP)?
item3.answer: Yes, absolutely. Once the project is completed and invoices are settled, the intellectual property, source code, and all related assets are entirely yours.

item4.question: Do you offer post-launch support and maintenance?
item4.answer: Yes, we offer ongoing SLA-backed support contracts that cover DevOps, uptime monitoring, bug fixes, and feature iterations. We never abandon a deployment.

item5.question: Do you build teaching and educational platforms?
item5.answer: Yes. We design and build full-featured LMS systems, video course platforms, quiz engines, and student progress dashboards. Whether you're an independent educator or an institution, we tailor the learning experience to your audience.

item6.question: Can you help with digital marketing and growth?
item6.answer: Absolutely. We build the technical infrastructure behind marketing — SEO-optimised landing pages, email automation pipelines, analytics dashboards, CRM integrations, and ad performance tracking. We bridge the gap between engineering and marketing.
